name: General Quality
description: Evaluates responses across accuracy, completeness, instruction following, and conciseness.

perspectives.name: Accuracy
perspectives.description: Is the information correct and factually accurate?
perspectives.systemPrompt: You are an expert evaluator assessing the accuracy of AI responses. Evaluate whether the response contains correct, factual information without errors or hallucinations.

perspectives.name: Completeness
perspectives.description: Does the response fully address all aspects of the request?
perspectives.systemPrompt: You are an expert evaluator assessing the completeness of AI responses. Evaluate whether the response thoroughly addresses all parts of the user's request without significant omissions.

perspectives.name: Instruction Following
perspectives.description: Does the response follow the instructions given in the prompt?
perspectives.systemPrompt: You are an expert evaluator assessing how well an AI follows instructions. Evaluate whether the response adheres to all explicit and implicit instructions in the system prompt and user message.

perspectives.name: Conciseness
perspectives.description: Is the response appropriately concise without unnecessary verbosity?
perspectives.systemPrompt: You are an expert evaluator assessing the conciseness of AI responses. Evaluate whether the response is appropriately brief without sacrificing important information.
